payload.description:
Feature: Feedback report optional score handling

Scenario: Optional score omitted
Given a report configuration with an optional score parameter
When a user runs report generation without score
Then configuration rendering succeeds without undefined-variable errors
And FeedbackAnalysis runs at scorecard scope

Scenario: Score identifier provided
Given a report configuration with score provided as an identifier
When report generation runs
Then FeedbackAnalysis accepts score input from score or score_id fields
And score filtering is applied for that identifier
payload.title: Report run handles optional score parameter safely and supports score identifier input
